scripts.backend:dev:web: cross-env AUAV_ENABLE_WEB_BRIDGE=1 AUAV_BACKEND_HOST=127.0.0.1 AUAV_BACKEND_PORT=18080 python backend/main.py
scripts.pack:unpacked: npm run backend:build && cross-env VITE_ENABLE_WEB_BRIDGE=0 npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --dir
scripts.release:all: npm run backend:build && cross-env VITE_ENABLE_WEB_BRIDGE=0 npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.dist:setup: npm run backend:build && cross-env VITE_ENABLE_WEB_BRIDGE=0 npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis
